description: Ideal Postcodes provides address lookup, autocomplete, cleansing, and related validation services such as email and phone validation. Its public documentation and account tooling are hosted under ideal-postcodes.co.uk/docs.ideal-postcodes.co.uk rather than ideal-postcodes.dev.
summary: ideal-postcodes.dev itself exposes no distinct public integration surface; the related Ideal Postcodes service integrates via a REST API at api.ideal-postcodes.co.uk and an npm-distributed CLI that both use Ideal Postcodes-issued credentials.
